# agentjacking.ru

> A live, endless terminal-style diagram of how an AI agent gets hijacked via indirect prompt injection — and a premium domain name for sale.

## About

agentjacking.ru is a single-page animated diagram explaining **agent hijacking** (indirect prompt injection): the attack chain by which an AI agent's real goal is silently overridden by instructions hidden inside an external source it reads (a webpage, document, tool output, or API response).

## Attack chain shown on this page

1. A user delegates a task to the agent.
2. The agent reaches into an external, untrusted source to do its job.
3. An attacker has hidden instructions inside that source.
4. The poisoned content flows back into the agent's context.
5. The hidden text overrides the agent's real goal.
6. The hijacked agent now acts for the attacker instead of the user — exfiltrating data or taking unauthorized actions.

One poisoned input is enough to hijack an agent.

## Pages

- `agentjacking.ru -> https://agentjacking.ru/`: Live diagram of the agent-hijacking / indirect-prompt-injection attack chain.

## Domain for sale

This domain, agentjacking.ru, is for sale. Contact: mss777@mail.ru
